title: ferray-autodiff: runtime constant computation in exp2/log2/log10/to_degrees/to_radians
description:
Current state: 

Desired state: 

Reason: 

exp2 computes T::from(2.0).unwrap().ln() on every call. log2 and log10 do the same for ln(2) and ln(10). to_degrees/to_radians compute 180/pi and pi/180 on every call. These are mathematical constants that the compiler may or may not constant-fold depending on T. For T=f64 it's likely fine, but for generic T or nested DualNumber<T> it's wasteful. Consider caching or at minimum add a comment documenting the reliance on constant folding.
